title: Antibacterial disk diffusion assay for honey extract

hypothesis.statement: Manuka honey extract produces a zone of inhibition ≥15mm against S. aureus at 50% w/v concentration
hypothesis.null_hypothesis: Manuka honey extract produces no measurable zone of inhibition against S. aureus
hypothesis.why_interesting: Testing whether the reported antibacterial properties of Manuka honey can be demonstrated in a standardized disk diffusion assay.

failure_conditions.condition: No zone of inhibition at any concentration
failure_conditions.interpretation: Extract has no antibacterial activity under these conditions
Assay technical failure - inoculum or incubation issue

failure_conditions.condition: Zone edges are fuzzy or irregular
failure_conditions.interpretation: May indicate bacteriostatic rather than bactericidal activity
